name: PDF Extraction & Generation
description: PDF template filling, OCR-based extraction, bid schedule parsing, IDR report generation
constraints_summary: No V1 imports in V2 extraction code
Binary routing: render -> preprocess -> OCR (no fallback to native)
No legacy compatibility flags or toggles
Header consolidation stage (4A.1) runs after provisional and final classification
Relaxed/rescue priceContinuation gates require item-number semantic to prevent false-positive row merges
Row parsing stack is V3-only (NumericInterpreter -> RowParserV3 -> FieldConfidenceScorer)
Grid line removal runs before cell OCR (GridLineRemover in Stage 2B-ii.6) with per-page fallback when removal fails
Low-confidence numeric-cell re-OCR fallback retries with PSM8 + numeric whitelist and replaces only when retry output contains digits

Crop upscaling uses geometry-aware continuous curve: targetDpi = kBaseDpi(600) + kBoostDpi(300) * max(0, 1 - cropWidth/kWidthCeiling(500)). Narrow columns get 2.28-2.71x scale, wide columns stay at 2.0x
Crop OCR sourceDpi is derived from effective DPI when provided; invalid DPI metadata is sanitized before OCR
Scorecard includes observability rows B1-B6 plus GridLineRemover/orphan coverage with hardened ratio thresholds
Interpretation pattern classification uses centralized `InterpretationPatterns` sets for standard vs correction logic
Math backsolve repairs unitPrice from bidAmount/quantity when OCR corrupts price and backsolve is exact within $0.02
Zero-conf sentinel replaces 0.0 OCR confidence with 0.50 neutral prior when cell has valid parsed text
M&P enrichment path is independent from extraction pipeline and uses per-page quality-gated native-first text with OCR fallback
M&P parser uses metadata-driven two-point anchor: regex `Item\s+(\d+)\.` + bid item number whitelist. Case-sensitive, period-required.

metrics.gt_item_matches: 131/131 on Android Springfield at the protected OCR baseline; latest faster 400/450 candidate regressed to 130/131.
metrics.notes: Session 741: The stage-decomposition refactor remains functionally healthy on Android. Diagnostics/artifact uploads are working, stage names are readable, and Springfield is green at 131/131 with exact checksum and autoAccept around 140s. The next OCR optimization candidate lowered runtime to about 128s but regressed to 130/131 after reducing default crop DPI too aggressively, so runtime tuning is now the active track.

current_phase.status: Protected Android green baseline is 131/131 at ~140s. Latest faster 400/450 OCR target regressed to 130/131 at ~128s and needs another tuning pass before more performance work.
current_phase.escalation_path: 1) Compare the protected 450-green Android run against the 400/450-regressed run 2) Raise the default OCR crop target enough to recover item-number fidelity 3) Re-run Springfield on Android after each OCR tuning change 4) Only consider OCR-worker isolates after correctness is restored below the 140s baseline
current_phase.diagnostic_images: Live Android artifacts are uploaded through tools/debug-server/artifacts, including report.json, scorecard.md, stage-trace.json, and stage-trace-summary.json.
remaining_problems: The latest faster OCR tuning candidate regressed to 130/131 by losing item-number fidelity
Android Springfield runtime is still above the current phase target of 120 seconds
